title: Under the Boardwalk: The Monopoly Story
original_title: Under the Boardwalk: The Monopoly Story
overview: Under the Boardwalk: The Monopoly Story shows how the classic board game has become a worldwide cultural phenomenon and follows the colorful players who come together to compete for the coveted title of Monopoly World Champion.
